title: [CPVP] White Low Fire
description: A clean White Low Fire texture pack designed specifically for CPVP and competitive Minecraft players.
body:
## 🤍 White Low Fire for CPVP

Welcome to the ultimate **White Low Fire** texture pack, specifically designed for competitive Minecraft players and Crystal PvP enthusiasts! 

Tired of the giant, default orange fire blocking your entire screen during intense fights? This pack is the perfect solution.

---

### ✨ Key Features

* 🤍 **Clean White Fire:** Replaces the default fire texture with a sleek, glowing white variant that looks incredibly clean.
* 🛡️ **Low-Height:** The fire is significantly lowered, giving you maximum visibility during Crystal PvP fights.
* 🚀 **FPS Friendly:** Uses optimized textures to ensure smooth performance and zero frame drops when you are on fire.
* 🔄 **Wide Compatibility:** Fully compatible with Minecraft **1.20 all the way up to 1.21.x** 

![What the Fire looks like in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/080cdbbae741a27b9c765c6a2220f4b9ddc32b18.png)


---

### 🎮 Why choose this pack?

In CPVP, every pixel counts. When an opponent anchors or crystals you, standard fire completely blinds you. With this pack, you can easily track your enemy's movement, aim your next crystal perfectly, and dominate the fight while looking stylish.

*If you like the pack, feel free to leave a download and share it with your friends!*
